name: @radzor/funnel-report
description: Build and analyze conversion funnels. Define ordered steps, record user progression, and generate reports with conversion rates and dropoff analysis. In-memory, zero dependencies.

inputs.name: steps
inputs.description: Ordered list of step names defining the funnel.

inputs.name: windowMs
inputs.description: Maximum time window in ms for a user to complete the funnel. Events outside the window are ignored.

outputs.name: funnelReport
outputs.description: Complete funnel analysis with per-step conversion rates and dropoff.

fields.name: overallConversion
fields.description: Conversion rate from first step to last step (0-1).

fields.name: totalUsers
fields.description: Total unique users who entered the funnel.

actions.name: defineStep

params.name: stepName
params.description: Name of the step to add to the funnel.

actions.description: Add a step to the end of the funnel definition.

actions.name: recordStep

params.name: stepName
params.description: Name of the step the user completed.

actions.description: Record that a user completed a specific funnel step.

actions.name: getReport
actions.description: Generate a funnel report with conversion rates and dropoff analysis.

actions.name: reset
actions.description: Clear all recorded step data. Funnel definition is preserved.

llm.constraints: All data is in-memory; resets on process restart. Steps must be defined before recording. The windowMs parameter sets the maximum time for a user to complete the funnel — user entries older than windowMs are pruned on report generation.
